tools.title: Access Review
tools.description: Generate an access review scoped to one identity

tools.title: Actuate Recommendation
tools.description: Write one action node from a recommendation and link it to targets and optional decision context

tools.title: Annotate Entity
tools.description: Append analyst/agent annotations to one entity with provenance metadata

tools.title: Autonomous Credential Response
tools.description: Start an autonomous credential exposure response workflow from a discovered secret or credential pivot

tools.title: Autonomous Workflow Approve
tools.description: Approve or reject a pending autonomous workflow and continue execution

tools.title: Autonomous Workflow Status
tools.description: Inspect an autonomous workflow run, its events, and any linked action execution

tools.title: Blast Radius
tools.description: Compute blast radius and reachable resources for a principal

tools.title: Pre-Action Policy Check
tools.description: Evaluate whether a proposed action should be allowed, denied, or require approval with optional propagation analysis

proposed_change.description: Optional proposed graph mutations to evaluate propagation and approval impact

trace_context.description: Optional trace metadata to carry through gateway calls

tools.title: Write World Model Claim
tools.description: Write one first-class claim with provenance, bitemporal fields, and evidence/source linkage

tools.title: Entity Context Card
tools.description: Build a context-rich entity insight card for Slack/Ensemble responses

entity.description: Entity node ID (for example customer:acme-corp, person:alice@example.com)

sections.description: Optional sections to include: risk, relationships, activity, recommendations

tools.title: Correlate Events
tools.description: Find temporal causal chains and anomaly signals around one event or entity

entity_id.description: Optional entity ID (for example service:payments) to scope correlated events.

event_id.description: Optional event node ID to expand into the local causal neighborhood.

include_anomalies.description: Include anomaly summaries for the same event/entity context.

limit.description: Maximum number of correlations/anomalies to return (1-200).

pattern_id.description: Optional built-in correlation pattern filter applied after event_id/entity_id scoping.

tools.title: Record Decision
tools.description: Write one decision node and connect it to targets/evidence/actions

tools.title: Entity History
tools.description: Reconstruct one entity at a historical time or diff one entity across two times

from.description: RFC3339 start timestamp for one entity diff window.

timestamp.description: RFC3339 point-in-time selector for one reconstructed entity state.

to.description: RFC3339 end timestamp for one entity diff window.

tools.title: Execution Status
tools.description: List recent shared-platform executions across report runs, scans, and action workflows

namespace.description: Optional execution namespaces to filter, for example report_run, workload_scan, image_scan, function_scan, action_engine.

report_id.description: Optional report definition ID filter for report executions.

tools.title: Findings
tools.description: List and search findings with filtering

tools.title: Graph Changelog
tools.description: Inspect recent graph snapshot changes or one stored/derived graph diff in detail

diff_id.description: Optional graph diff ID from changelog results. When set, returns detailed filtered diff data for either a stored artifact or a derived adjacent snapshot diff.

last.description: Optional duration window for changelog listing, for example 24h or 7d.

since.description: Optional RFC3339 lower bound for changelog listing.

until.description: Optional RFC3339 upper bound for changelog listing.

tools.title: Graph Query
tools.description: Run graph queries for neighbors or shortest paths

from.description: Optional RFC3339 temporal window start (requires to)

to.description: Optional RFC3339 temporal window end (requires from)

tools.title: Graph Mutation Simulation
tools.description: Run a hypothetical graph simulation for proposed node/edge mutations

tools.title: Identity Calibration
tools.description: Return identity precision/coverage metrics and optional review queue backlog

tools.title: Identity Review
tools.description: Record a human verdict for one alias->canonical identity candidate

tools.title: Graph Leverage Report
tools.description: Build a deep graph leverage report across identity, ingestion, temporal, closed-loop, predictive, query, and actuation readiness

decision_sla_days.description: Days before a decision without outcomes is considered stale (1-365)

tools.title: Record Observation
tools.description: Write one evidence observation targeting an entity with provenance and temporal metadata

tools.title: Record Outcome
tools.description: Write one outcome node and connect it back to decision + impacted targets

tools.title: Graph Quality Report
tools.description: Build graph quality KPIs and prioritized recommendations for ontology, identity, temporal, and write-back health

tools.title: Platform Intelligence Report Run
tools.description: Build a decision-grade intelligence report with prioritized insights and evidence

execution_mode.description: Whether to execute inline or queue a durable report run

materialize_result.description: Whether to persist the materialized report snapshot payload

retry_policy.description: Retry and backoff configuration for durable async report runs

tools.title: Resolve Identity
tools.description: Resolve one external alias to canonical identity nodes with confidence scoring

tools.title: Risk Score
tools.description: Return composite risk scoring details for an entity

tools.title: Scenario Simulation
tools.description: Run high-level scenario simulations (customer_churn, access_removal, team_change, service_disruption, vendor_exit, role_change)

parameters.description: Scenario-specific parameters (for example to_team, from_team, new_role)

target.description: Primary node identifier to simulate against

tools.title: Split Identity
tools.description: Remove one alias->canonical identity link to reverse an incorrect merge

tools.title: Graph Query Templates
tools.description: List reusable graph investigation templates for analysts and agents

resources.name: Agent SDK Contract Catalog
resources.description: Generated Agent SDK contract catalog with tools, resources, and MCP method metadata

resources.name: Platform Report Catalog
resources.description: Built-in platform intelligence report definitions exposed for agent discovery

resources.name: Edge Kinds
resources.description: Registered graph edge kind schema definitions

resources.name: Node Kinds
resources.description: Registered graph node kind schema definitions

resources.name: Agent Tool Catalog
resources.description: Discovered Agent SDK tool catalog with JSON Schema parameters

methods.name: initialize
methods.description: Initialize one MCP session over Streamable HTTP

methods.name: tools/call
methods.description: Invoke one Agent SDK tool by public ID

methods.name: resources/read
methods.description: Read one Agent SDK resource payload

methods.name: notifications/progress
methods.description: Server-initiated progress notifications for long-running report executions

methods.name: notifications/report_section
methods.description: Server-initiated section payload notifications for durable report executions
